title: Kuldhara: The Cursed Village
caption: Ek aisi jagah jahan raat ko koi nahi rukta. Kya sach mein yahan bhoot hain? Jaanne ke liye dekhiye yeh mystery. #UNRAAZ #Mystery #Horror

scenes.narration: Rajasthan ke sunsaan registaan mein basa hai ek aisa gaon, jahan ki galiyan aaj bhi cheekhti hain.
scenes.image_prompt: vertical 9:16 cinematic realistic image, wide shot of an abandoned ancient stone village in the Thar desert during twilight, eerie atmosphere, golden hour lighting, crumbling stone houses.

scenes.narration: Kuldhara. Ek raat mein 1500 log gayab ho gaye, bina kisi nishaan ke. Kahan gaye woh sab?
scenes.image_prompt: vertical 9:16 cinematic realistic image, close up of an old rusted wooden door slightly open, dusty floor, dark interior, cinematic shadows, high contrast.

scenes.narration: Kehte hain ki gaanv ke mukhiya ne shraap diya tha, ki yahan kabhi koi insaan phir nahi bas payega.
scenes.image_prompt: vertical 9:16 cinematic realistic image, silhouette of an old man standing in front of a ruined stone structure, mystical atmosphere, fog, dramatic lighting.

scenes.narration: Aaj bhi, yahan aane wale log ajeeb aawazein aur parchhaiyon ka anubhav karte hain.
scenes.image_prompt: vertical 9:16 cinematic realistic image, POV shot walking through narrow dark abandoned stone alleyway, grainy footage style, creepy shadows on the wall.

scenes.narration: Kya aap mein himmat hai yahan raat bitane ki? Comments mein batayein aur subscribe karein UNRAAZ ko.
scenes.image_prompt: vertical 9:16 cinematic realistic image, extreme wide shot of Kuldhara village under a full moon night, starry sky, cold blue tones, mysterious and lonely.
